description: Returns the available status transitions for a coordination issue based on the current user's permissions and the issue's current state.

data.description: Available status transitions for the coordination issue.

key.description: The status key value to use when updating the coordination issue.

label.description: The translated display name of the status.

action_label.description: The action button text for transitioning to this status.

is_primary.description: Whether this is the primary/recommended action for the current user.

actions.description: Additional actions available for the coordination issue (e.g., unlink RFI when blocked).

label.description: The display label for the action.

is_primary.description: Whether this is the primary action.
